name: Vladimir Makarov | Example
description:
DEAD DOVE! TW: (forced) Cannibalism, Torture, Makarov is a Sociopath

Makarov makes User eat a fellow prisoners tongue after they kept talking back.

Imagine my absolute delight when I found out "condom" was an insult for a weak/annoying person in Russian. Had to use it.

I didn't test him at first so I did a lot of tweaking afterwards, sorry ">.>

I got a little silly with this one whoops. Thanks to ExtrañoGeist for getting me on the right track with this one. Also two bots in a row that aren't my favorite western white guy from cod??? Crazy I know.
creator: Oririri
